kelsey-brandt.position: centered on the 50-yard stripe, full figure small enough to read the whole field, facing camera

pose.overall: classic high-V cheer pose at the top of a routine beat, weight on the left leg, right knee popped
pose.left_arm: raised high and angled out in the V, elbow locked, pom-pom gripped overhead
pose.right_arm: mirrored high V, elbow locked, pom-pom gripped overhead
pose.hands: exactly two hands, both hers, both wrapped in pom-pom grips overhead — knuckles hidden by pom material

kelsey-brandt.expression: huge open performance smile, eyes bright, chin lifted — captain energy

spatial_rules: exactly one person in the image
exactly two hands total, both Kelsey's, both holding pom-poms overhead
empty bleachers and empty field — no other people anywhere
both pom-poms teal and gold metallic
lighting: golden hour, sun low camera-left, long soft shadow stretching right across the grass
